overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {for iter = 0:maxiter} \\ \text {for j = 2:(m + 1)} \\ \text {for i = 2:(m + 1)} \\ \text {unew(i,j) = 0.25*(u(i - 1,j) + u(i + 1,j) + ...} \\ \text {u(i,j - 1) + u(i,j + 1) - h^2 * f(i,j));} \\ \text {end} \\ \text {end} \\ \text {u = unew;} \\ \text {end} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {for iter = 0:maxiter} \\ \text {for j = 2:(m + 1)} \\ \text {for i = 2:(m + 1)} \\ \text {unew(i,j) = 0.25*(u(i - 1,j) + u(i + 1,j) + ...} \\ \text {u(i,j - 1) + u(i,j + 1) - h}^{2}\text{ * f(i,j));} \\ \text {end} \\ \text {end} \\ \text {u = unew;} \\ \text {end} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {choose a guess u_{0}} \\ r _ {0} = f - A u _ {0} \\ \text {for k = 1, 2, \ldots} \\ \quad w _ {k - 1} = A r _ {k - 1} \\ \quad \alpha_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) / (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} w _ {k - 1}) \\ \quad u _ {k} = u _ {k - 1} + \alpha_ {k - 1} r _ {k - 1} \\ \quad r _ {k} = r _ {k - 1} - \alpha_ {k - 1} w _ {k - 1} \\ \quad \text {if \|r_{k}\| is less than some tolerance then stop} \\ \quad \text {end} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {choose a guess } u_{0} \\ r _ {0} = f - A u _ {0} \\ \text {for } k = 1, 2, \ldots \\ \quad w _ {k - 1} = A r _ {k - 1} \\ \quad \alpha_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) / (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} w _ {k - 1}) \\ \quad u _ {k} = u _ {k - 1} + \alpha_ {k - 1} r _ {k - 1} \\ \quad r _ {k} = r _ {k - 1} - \alpha_ {k - 1} w _ {k - 1} \\ \quad \text {if } \|r_{k}\| \text { is less than some tolerance then stop} \\ \quad \text {end} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {Choose initial guess u_{0} (possibly the zero vector)} \\ r _ {0} = f - A u _ {0} \\ p _ {0} = r _ {0} \\ \text {for k = 1, 2, ...} \\ \quad w _ {k - 1} = A p _ {k - 1} \\ \alpha_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) / (p _ {k - 1} ^ {T} w _ {k - 1}) \\ u _ {k} = u _ {k - 1} + \alpha_ {k - 1} p _ {k - 1} \\ r _ {k} = r _ {k - 1} - \alpha_ {k - 1} w _ {k - 1} \\ \text {if \|r_{k}\| is less than some tolerance then stop} \\ \beta_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k} ^ {T} r _ {k}) / (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) \\ p _ {k} = r _ {k} + \beta_ {k - 1} p _ {k - 1} \\ \text {end} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {Choose initial guess } u_{0} \text { (possibly the zero vector)} \\ r _ {0} = f - A u _ {0} \\ p _ {0} = r _ {0} \\ \text {for k = 1, 2, ...} \\ \quad w _ {k - 1} = A p _ {k - 1} \\ \alpha_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) / (p _ {k - 1} ^ {T} w _ {k - 1}) \\ u _ {k} = u _ {k - 1} + \alpha_ {k - 1} p _ {k - 1} \\ r _ {k} = r _ {k - 1} - \alpha_ {k - 1} w _ {k - 1} \\ \text {if } \|r_{k}\| \text { is less than some tolerance then stop} \\ \beta_ {k - 1} = (r _ {k} ^ {T} r _ {k}) / (r _ {k - 1} ^ {T} r _ {k - 1}) \\ p _ {k} = r _ {k} + \beta_ {k - 1} p _ {k - 1} \\ \text {end} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} q _ {1} = r _ {0} / \| r _ {0} \| _ {2} \\ \text {for k = 1, 2, ...} \\ v = A q _ {k} \\ \text {for i = 1:k} \\ h _ {i k} = q _ {i} ^ {T} v \\ v = v - h _ {i k} q _ {i} & \% \text {orthogonalize to previous vectors} \\ \text {end} \\ h _ {k + 1, k} = \| v \| _ {2} \\ q _ {k + 1} = v / h _ {k + 1, k} & \% \text {normalize} \\ \% \text {For GMRES: Check residual of least squares problem (4.75).} \\ \% \text {If it's sufficiently small, halt and compute u_{k}} \\ \text {end} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} q _ {1} = r _ {0} / \| r _ {0} \| _ {2} \\ \text {for k = 1, 2, ...} \\ v = A q _ {k} \\ \text {for i = 1:k} \\ h _ {i k} = q _ {i} ^ {T} v \\ v = v - h _ {i k} q _ {i} & \% \text {orthogonalize to previous vectors} \\ \text {end} \\ h _ {k + 1, k} = \| v \| _ {2} \\ q _ {k + 1} = v / h _ {k + 1, k} & \% \text {normalize} \\ \% \text {For GMRES: Check residual of least squares problem (4.75).} \\ \% \text {If it's sufficiently small, halt and compute } u_{k} \\ \text {end} \end{array}

overrides.expect: A = \frac {1}{h ^ {2}} \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} \left(h ^ {2} c _ {1} - 2 a _ {1}\right) & \left(a _ {1} + h b _ {1} / 2\right) & & \\ \left(a _ {2} - h b _ {2} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {2} - 2 a _ {2}\right) & \left(a _ {2} + h b _ {2} / 2\right) & \\ \ddots & \ddots & \ddots & \\ & \left(a _ {m - 1} - h b _ {m - 1} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {m - 1} - 2 a _ {m - 1}\right) & \left(a _ {m - 1} + h b _ {m - 1} / 2\right) \\ & & \left(a _ {m} - h b _ {m} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {m} - 2 a _ {m}\right) \end{array} \right. \tag {3-6}\tag{2.67}
overrides.new: A = \frac {1}{h ^ {2}} \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} \left(h ^ {2} c _ {1} - 2 a _ {1}\right) & \left(a _ {1} + h b _ {1} / 2\right) & & \\ \left(a _ {2} - h b _ {2} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {2} - 2 a _ {2}\right) & \left(a _ {2} + h b _ {2} / 2\right) & \\ \ddots & \ddots & \ddots & \\ & \left(a _ {m - 1} - h b _ {m - 1} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {m - 1} - 2 a _ {m - 1}\right) & \left(a _ {m - 1} + h b _ {m - 1} / 2\right) \\ & & \left(a _ {m} - h b _ {m} / 2\right) & \left(h ^ {2} c _ {m} - 2 a _ {m}\right) \end{array} \right] \tag {3-6}
